title: narcissus tazetta var. cypri
intro: Narcissus tazetta var. cypri, also known as the Cyprian narcissus or Poet's narcissus, is a bulbous perennial plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant's flowers have a strong, sweet fragrance and are often used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Narcissus tazetta var. cypri include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, and its antimicrobial properties, which can help to prevent the growth of bacteria and fungi. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and is also used to treat skin conditions, such as wounds and eczema.
